title: Hotfix — Messages tab crash (mutedConvos / restrictedSet)
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Messages + Connect + other tabs no longer crash with 'mutedConvos is not defined'
Root cause: yesterday's mute-icon + restrict-enforcement patch referenced ChatBox-scoped variables from MessagesScreen scope
Fix: inbox now has its own mutedConvos + restrictedSet state, kept in sync via storage events
All 13 earlier audit fixes (Edit Post, location chips, audience filter, etc.) still in this bundle
